title: Tweet — siblings running their relationship through ChatGPT
html:
Viral @justalexoki tweet (Aug 1 2025, 1.6M views, 41K likes) Yahir captured: his brother is running every relationship issue through chatgpt — and the girl is too — so it's "essentially ChatGPT in a relationship with ChatGPT." Cultural-substrate exhibit for the ai as relationship mediator thread.

chatgpt · ai as relationship mediator · ai culture
